activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: My brother work in a bookshop.

evaluator.answer: My brother works in a bookshop

activities.explanation: El sujeto singular «my brother» requiere «works».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: Listen! Someone knock at the door.

evaluator.answer: Listen! Someone is knocking at the door

activities.explanation: «Listen!» indica una acción en progreso: «is knocking».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: We are usually eating dinner at seven.

evaluator.answer: We usually eat dinner at seven

activities.explanation: Una rutina con «usually» se expresa con present simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: The children plays in the garden now.

evaluator.answer: The children are playing in the garden now

activities.explanation: «Now» presenta una acción actual y el sujeto plural requiere «are playing».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: Does Mia drives to work?

evaluator.answer: Does Mia drive to work

activities.explanation: Después de «does» usamos el infinitivo «drive».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: I stay with my uncle this week while my flat is painted.

evaluator.answer: I am staying with my uncle this week while my flat is painted

activities.explanation: «This week» presenta la estancia como temporal: «am staying».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: This umbrella is belonging to the receptionist.

evaluator.answer: This umbrella belongs to the receptionist

activities.explanation: «Belong» describe un estado y no se usa aquí en continuo.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: Why you are laughing?

evaluator.answer: Why are you laughing

activities.explanation: En la pregunta, «are» debe preceder al sujeto: «Why are you ...?».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: The 8.30 train is leave from platform six.

evaluator.answer: The 8.30 train leaves from platform six

activities.explanation: Los horarios oficiales se expresan con present simple: «leaves».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: They aren't use the upstairs office today.

evaluator.answer: They aren't using the upstairs office today

activities.explanation: La negativa continua requiere «aren't using».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: I am understanding your concern, but the policy is clear.

evaluator.answer: I understand your concern, but the policy is clear

activities.explanation: «Understand» es un verbo de estado y usa present simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: More commuters use bicycles this year, and the number continues to rise.

evaluator.answer: More commuters are using bicycles this year, and the number continues to rise

activities.explanation: «This year» presenta una tendencia en desarrollo: «are using».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: I think about accepting the new role at the moment.

evaluator.answer: I am thinking about accepting the new role at the moment

activities.explanation: «Think about» describe aquí un proceso de consideración actual.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: I am thinking the second option is safer.

evaluator.answer: I think the second option is safer

activities.explanation: Cuando «think» expresa una opinión, se usa normalmente en present simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: We have dinner right now, so can I call you later?

evaluator.answer: We are having dinner right now, so can I call you later

activities.explanation: «Have dinner» es una actividad en progreso: «are having».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: This soup is tasting slightly bitter.

evaluator.answer: This soup tastes slightly bitter

activities.explanation: Aquí «taste» describe una propiedad del alimento, por lo que usa simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: The chef tastes the soup now to check the seasoning.

evaluator.answer: The chef is tasting the soup now to check the seasoning

activities.explanation: La acción deliberada que ocurre ahora se expresa con «is tasting».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: You always leave your wet towels on the floor these days!

evaluator.answer: You are always leaving your wet towels on the floor these days

activities.explanation: El continuo con «always» puede enfatizar una conducta repetida que irrita.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: Nora is being a very patient person in general.

evaluator.answer: Nora is a very patient person in general

activities.explanation: Un rasgo general se expresa con «is»; «is being» sugeriría conducta temporal.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: I see my adviser at eleven tomorrow; we arranged it yesterday.

evaluator.answer: I am seeing my adviser at eleven tomorrow; we arranged it yesterday

activities.explanation: Un encuentro personal ya acordado puede expresarse con present continuous.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: The laboratory is containing three climate-controlled rooms.

evaluator.answer: The laboratory contains three climate-controlled rooms

activities.explanation: «Contain» describe composición o contenido y usa present simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: The technician weighs the sample at the moment.

evaluator.answer: The technician is weighing the sample at the moment

activities.explanation: «Weigh» describe aquí la acción de medir que ocurre ahora.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: The sample is weighing 250 grams.

evaluator.answer: The sample weighs 250 grams

activities.explanation: Cuando «weigh» indica el peso de algo, funciona como verbo de estado.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: The conference is beginning at nine every weekday according to its permanent schedule.

evaluator.answer: The conference begins at nine every weekday according to its permanent schedule

activities.explanation: Un horario repetido y oficial usa present simple: «begins».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present-tense error.
activities.prompt: The clinic normally closes at six, but this week it closes at four because the staff are training.

evaluator.answer: The clinic normally closes at six, but this week it is closing at four because the staff are training

activities.explanation: La norma estable usa «closes» y el cambio temporal de esta semana «is closing».
